hero.name: Gaspar Giménez
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · AI Engineer · Founder
hero.description: Building scalable systems, launching startups, and creating AI-driven products that make an impact.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a full-stack developer and AI engineer with over 5 years of experience building production-grade software. My approach combines a startup mindset with systems thinking — I design architectures that scale and ship products that matter.
about.p2: From co-founding tech startups to teaching at university, I thrive at the intersection of engineering, leadership, and innovation. I care deeply about clean code, scalable infrastructure, and solving real problems with technology.

technician.title: IT Technician
technician.institution: Instituto Politécnico Superior — General San Martín

items.title: Broken Shepherds
items.description: Worked as a Backend and Cloud Engineer at [TheBlueBox](https://www.linkedin.com/company/theblueboxdev).
items.impact: Live production platform serving real users with seamless performance.

items.title: Bravo Web
items.description: The core web application for Bravo, a tech startup. Built end-to-end with a modern stack, featuring automated deployments, database management, and a polished user interface.
items.impact: Startup's main product platform with CI/CD and automated testing.

items.title: Lambda Works
items.description: Corporate website for Lambda Works, a boutique software studio focused on nearshore development. Clean design showcasing services, case studies, and company values.
items.impact: Professional web presence for a growing software consultancy.

lambda.title: Lambda Works
lambda.subtitle: Boutique Software Studio
lambda.description: Lambda Works is a boutique software studio I founded, specializing in nearshore development for US-based clients. We build MVPs, internal systems, and automation solutions with a strong emphasis on structure, scalability, and clean architecture.
points: Focus on scalability and clean architecture

items.description: Leading technical development of a tech startup. Built the main web application using Laravel, Next.js, and MySQL with Docker containerization and CI/CD via GitHub Actions. Contributed to idea validation, marketing strategy, and product direction.

Designed and developed backend systems using NestJS, GCP, and Postgres. Optimized search infrastructure by migrating to vectorized search, reducing query time from ~1 minute to ~4 seconds. Led deployment and infrastructure on GCP with App Engine and Cloud Tasks.
Delivered scalable solutions for core company projects. Led migration to a modern tech stack using Next.js and AngularJS integrated with Laravel RESTful APIs.
Supervised and generated code for training various LLMs focused on data science. Worked primarily with Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib for AI model development.
Teaching Logic at FCEIA-UNR and previously Graphs at IPS-UNR. Created class materials and delivered lectures on algorithms including Dijkstra's algorithm.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, interesting projects, or just having a good conversation about technology.
